empty.body: Find something you love and it’ll show up here.

getCredits.title: Purchase {currency}
getCredits.subtitle: Get {currency} and start shopping in the Marketplace!
getCredits.canceledNote: Payment canceled — no charge was made. Pick a pack whenever you’re ready.
getCredits.successBody: Your {currency} are ready to spend in the Marketplace.
getCredits.pendingBody: Your payment went through. It’s taking a little longer than usual to confirm — your balance will update automatically as soon as it lands, no need to pay again.
getCredits.errorTimeout: This is taking longer than usual — your {currency} will appear shortly.
getCredits.errorGeneric: Couldn’t complete your purchase — please try again.

notifyMe.error: Couldn't save that — please try again.

makeOffer.comingSoon: Coming soon — you'll be able to make an offer on items that aren't for sale.

error.generic: Couldn't complete the purchase — please try again.

cartCheckout.errorHeadline: We couldn't complete your purchase this time.
cartCheckout.errorBody: Don't worry, your credits are safe. Please try again in a moment.

resales.title: Resales
resales.subtitle: Other copies of this item on sale right now.
resales.legacyNote: These copies aren't available to buy here — open the classic marketplace to purchase them.

success.confirmingAfter: — this usually takes a few seconds. Keep this tab open.
success.timedOutBefore: This is taking longer than usual to confirm. Your purchase may still complete — check
success.timedOutAfter: in a few minutes to see the final status. No need to buy again.
success.failedBody: The purchase couldn’t be completed, so nothing was delivered. Your credits weren’t spent (any hold is released shortly) — you can try again.
success.title: It’s yours!
success.itemsInWardrobe: {count, plural, one {# item is now in your wardrobe.} other {# items are now in your wardrobe.}}
success.bannerBody: You can find your item in the My Assets tab.

itemPreview.shownOnBody: Shown on a {shape} body — this item isn’t made for your avatar’s shape.

assets.marketUnavailable: Some market prices are temporarily unavailable — buying those items is paused for a moment. Please try again shortly.
assets.loadError: Couldn’t load items — please try again.

myAssets.signInPrompt: Sign in to sell your items.
myAssets.removeListingError: Couldn’t remove the listing — please try again.
myAssets.importSub: You have {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} for sale elsewhere — bring them into the Shop.
myAssets.ownedSub: Wearables & emotes you’ve bought — resell them in the Shop.
myAssets.ownedError: Couldn’t load your items — please try again.
myAssets.ownedEmpty: Items you own will show up here. Explore the shop and start your collection.
myAssets.namesEmpty: Claim a unique NAME to stand out in Decentraland — it’ll appear here once it’s yours.
myAssets.creationsSub: Items you made. Put them on sale in the Shop — set a price in {currency} and buyers pay with {currency}.
myAssets.collectionsError: We couldn’t load your collections right now. Please try again in a moment.
myAssets.nothingToPublish: You don’t have any items to publish yet.

activity.emptyPurchasesBody: When you buy something it’ll appear here.
activity.emptySalesBody: When someone buys one of your items it’ll appear here.

myFavorites.emptyBody: Tap the heart on any item to save it here.

overview.emptyTitle: New drops are on the way
overview.emptyBody: There are no items on sale right now — check back soon.

footer.newsletterTitle: Get the weekly highlights in your inbox

creations.title: Your creations

owned.title: Items you own
owned.sub: Things you've bought elsewhere — resell them in the Shop.

importListings.signInBody: Sign in to bring the items you already sell into the Shop.
importListings.emptyBody: Everything you sell is already in the Shop — nothing to import.
importListings.lede: These items are already for sale elsewhere. We suggested a price in {currency} for each — matched to today's rate and rounded up. Adjust anything, then list them.
importListings.selectedSummary: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} selected · ${usd}

sellModal.errorGeneric: Couldn't list your item — please try again.
sellModal.errorWholeNumber: Enter a whole number of credits

primaryList.errorGeneric: Couldn't publish your item — please try again.
primaryList.errorWholeNumber: Enter a whole number of credits
primaryList.fromCollection: From your collection “{collectionName}” · {count, plural, one {# available} other {# available}}
primaryList.firstTimeConfirm: First time selling from “{collectionName}”? It needs a one-time approval, then you’ll confirm the listing — two quick confirmations. After this, listing more items from this collection is a single step.
primaryList.firstTimeManaged: First time selling from “{collectionName}”? Setting it up takes a moment — after that, listing more items from this collection is instant.
primaryList.readyConfirm: This collection is ready — publishing is a single confirmation.
primaryList.readyManaged: This collection is ready — publishing is instant.

migrate.listedSummary: {count, plural, one {# item is} other {# items are}} now for sale with {currency}.
migrate.skippedSummary: {count, plural, one {# skipped} other {# skipped}} — you can try those again anytime.
migrate.unlistedSummary: {count, plural, one {# item was taken off the old marketplace but couldn't be re-listed — re-list it from My Assets.} other {# items were taken off the old marketplace but couldn't be re-listed — re-list them from My Assets.}}
migrate.subConfirm: We take down each old listing and re-list it for credits — confirm each step.
migrate.subManaged: Moving your items to the Shop.
migrate.unlistedTooltip: Removed from the old marketplace but not re-listed — re-list it from My Assets.
migrate.hintConfirm: A couple of quick confirmations pop up per item (take down + re-list). Keep this open.
migrate.hintManaged: This only takes a moment — keep this open.

fittingRoom.title: Fitting room
fittingRoom.emptyStageBody: Turn on an item from the list to try it.
fittingRoom.sub: Mix and match your cart. Turn items on and off to see the look.
fittingRoom.conflictTooltip: Only one item per slot can be worn
fittingRoom.madeForShape: This item is made for the {shape} body shape

names.heroSubtitle: Activate the full potential of Decentraland citizenship with a unique NAME & your own World!
names.taken: This NAME is taken. Choose another NAME or make an offer to the owner.
names.tooShort: Names must be at least {min} characters.
names.checkError: We couldn’t check that NAME right now — you can still try to claim it.
names.why1: Stand out with a unique alias for your Avatar
names.why2: Unlock your World and customize your own virtual 3D space to host events
names.why3: A dedicated URL for your virtual spaces to guide visitors with an exclusive URL to your LAND
names.subtitle: Decentraland NAMEs
names.confirmBody: You’ve selected {name}. Re-enter the NAME to confirm your selection and continue with your purchase.
names.successBannerRest: You can find your NAME in the My Items tab.
names.errorGeneric: We couldn’t complete your purchase. Please try again.

authorizations.title: Approvals
authorizations.intro: One-time approvals let the Shop act on your behalf. You stay in control — turn any of them off whenever you like.
authorizations.creditsDesc: Lets the Shop top up a purchase from your balance when your credits don’t fully cover it.
authorizations.sellingDesc: Lets the Shop hand over an item from this collection when it sells.
authorizations.sellingEmpty: Nothing to approve yet. Approvals for selling appear here once you own collectibles.
authorizations.errorGeneric: Couldn’t update that — please try again.
authorizations.signInBody: Sign in to see and manage the approvals on your account.
authorizations.managedBody: Your account handles everything automatically — there’s nothing here to manage. Buying and selling just work.

collectibles.title: Browse Collectibles
collectibles.description: Browse thousands of wearables and emotes for your Decentraland avatar. Filter by category, rarity, and price to find your next look.

collection.description: Explore every wearable and emote in the {name} collection on the Decentraland Shop.

creator.description: Discover wearables and emotes by {name} on the Decentraland Shop.

names.title: Get a Decentraland NAME
names.description: Claim your unique Decentraland NAME with credits — a personal alias for your avatar and your own World.
